author: Alex Rivera
content: Orion Health (c_009) — PatientFlow onboarding: PMs report high drop-off after first dashboard session; funnel_analysis events trail peers. Worth a dedicated onboarding audit before Q2 goals.

author: Jordan Kim
content: PatientFlow / c_009: ai_assistant adoption picking up among clinical ops leads; still low among admin roles. Align in-app prompts with admin workflows.

author: Sam Okonkwo
content: Product team observation — Orion Health asked for clearer funnel stages in PatientFlow; current funnel_analysis labels confuse their compliance review. Follow up with design.
